name: distributed-event-ordering
description: Simulation of a resilient distributed event ordering system using Lamport and vector clocks.

scripts.start:order: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'services/order-service/index.js'));"
scripts.start:payment: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'services/payment-service/index.js'));"
scripts.start:restaurant: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'services/restaurant-service/index.js'));"
scripts.start:delivery: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'services/delivery-service/index.js'));"
scripts.start:collector: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'event-collector/collector.js'));"
scripts.start:all: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'scripts/startAll.js'));"
scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'scripts/startAll.js'));"
scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=fs.realpathSync('.'); require(path.join(cwd,'scripts/check.js'));"
